name: buddy-stickers
description: Generate personalized Telegram sticker packs for your Claude Code buddy. 18 species x 12 unique emotions. Auto-creates sticker packs with bold outlines and transparent backgrounds.
author: Daria Voronkina (@aishipuchka)

buddy.description: Generate Telegram sticker packs for your Claude Code buddy

buddy_react.description: Buddy sticker reactions for PostToolUse hooks

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: OpenRouter API key for image generation (sign up at openrouter.ai — free $5 credit)

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Telegram Bot token from @BotFather (for creating sticker packs)

telegram-mtproto.description: Telethon session at ~/.claude/scripts/telegram-mcp/ for sending stickers. Get API credentials at my.telegram.org
